prompt: Select the correct tool, material, or replacement approach and explain why the observed choice is wrong.
scenario: In a T1 work setting, the evaluated element is E-103 Overcurrent device selection & coordination within 2.1 Electrical. The relevant subcategory is 2.1.1 Power Distribution. title: T1 E-103 Tool & material selection
